title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Accenture India Global Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Accenture India Global Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Accenture India Global Group has an exciting opening for a Backend Developer at our Ghaziabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Accenture India Global Group:
Accenture India Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Accenture India Global Group!
